findings.evidence: Packet-level strategy distribution is highly mixed (try_catch=274, throws=118, returns_null=191, result_type=13 in review_context.error_conventions), indicating inconsistent error contracts across modules.
A centralized error pathway exists (`src/shared/lib/errorHandling/handleError.ts` + `errorNormalization.ts` + typed errors in `errors.ts`), but adoption is partial relative to mixed strategies above.

Several files show unusually high comment density in review_context.ai_debt_signals (e.g., `src/shared/lib/queryDefaults.ts` comment_ratio 0.54, `src/shared/lib/settingsResolution.ts` 0.52, `src/shared/hooks/useShots.ts` 0.50), with frequent explanatory restatement patterns.
`src/shared/lib/simpleCacheValidator.ts` contains verbose console-heavy debug scaffolding and help text; useful in dev, but contributes boilerplate/debug debt signal in production code tree.
`src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/VideoLightbox.tsx` shows layered decomposition (mode/env/shared/edit/render models), improving separation of concerns despite a large prop surface.
`src/shared/lib/utils.ts` mixes unrelated utilities (`cn`, filename/text truncation, time formatting) in a general helper module, indicating mild cohesion drift.

`src/types/shots.ts` is a deprecated re-export shim with sunset metadata, and `src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/legacyStructureVideo.ts` preserves deprecated legacy fields; this indicates transitional, partially split contracts.
Core contracts still rely on broad shapes such as `params: Record<string, unknown>` in `src/shared/lib/taskCreation/types.ts`, reducing compile-time guarantees for task payload structure.

`src/shared/lib/supabaseSession.ts` correctly parses unknown JSON defensively, but runtime key extraction from `Record<string, unknown>` indicates reliance on runtime validation over strict static schemas.

Local logic is generally straightforward in sampled modules (`src/shared/lib/settingsResolution.ts`, `src/shared/components/JoinClipsSettingsForm/utils.ts`, `src/shared/lib/utils.ts`), but heavy inline documentation and compatibility layers increase cognitive overhead.
